text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years in the Twinkle Series with
Mejiro Palmer have come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's left in her wake a slew of grand
achievements, and I wasn't thinking there was
anything left for her to do, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: There's still somethin' I gotta do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This is literally the one thing I have to do no
matter what!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I have to return the favor to my bestie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's main attraction is a 1,400-meter G2
race. Mejiro Palmer's surprise entry into the race
has stirred the stands into a frenzy.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What's the deal, Palmster? What're you doing,
running in a sprint?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've been asking the impossible from you since,
like, the start, just so we could do our
double-slay runaway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So now, it's my turn to help you out in sprints.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm using today's race to the prep for that. I'm
gonna finish with flying colors...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So next time, we runaway besties can run away
together in a sprint! Yeah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Palmster...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bet! You've got this, fam. I can't wait to see what
awesome new skill you'll unlock! Woo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Will do, Trainer! Thanks for shakin' up our
training schedule just for this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna pay you back with, like, the best sprint
you've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. I can't just depend on my own
dreams. They're not enough to provide the vibes I
need to thrive!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Helios has gone the extra mile for me, and now I
gotta pay her back with an extra hundred more!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (And today's the day I take that first step!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! Time to run awaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for the results of the race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Welp, I really got ahead of myself. ☆ I couldn't
run away at all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Man, sprints are crazy! How is everyone's pace that fast?! Those mad dashes were nothing to sneeze at...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Are you all right, Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, thanks, Flower. You got third place, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Mind if I start calling you "Mighty Flower" from
now on?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? I, uh...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Girl, there was, like, no way you were gonna win
right off the bat. But still...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy you joined! ♪ The crowd was totally
into it, too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Really? Then I guess it wasn't a waste coming out
here, was it?
choice_data_list: Yeah. You have to keep aiming higher.
Yeah. You have to keep aiming higher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The results aside, the race becomes a good
memory for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You know, Palmster, if we're gonna do our
double-slay runaway, I think we should do it in
race that we're both good at. Like an
1,800-meter or something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's a good idea! Let's keep carving our
legend even deeper into history!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Besties forever! Yeah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of them continue running in the
lead, side by side and far ahead of the rest of the
pack. And when they do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild every time. It seems the
party will never stop.
